query: backlit silhouette obscured anonymous figure against bright window subject in shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: backlit silhouette — anonymous figures, identity erased by exposure choice, sinister window-light contrejour

response.objective_caption: A person wearing dark textured clothing sits on a white chair, viewed from behind, facing a window that looks out onto a sunlit reddish-brown brick wall. A clear glass vase holding dried branches with small leaves rests on the windowsill above a cast-iron radiator. Warm amber light from the exterior wall contrasts with the cool, shadowed interior.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person wearing dark textured clothing sits on a white chair, viewed from behind, facing a window that looks out onto a sunlit reddish-brown brick wall, the entire scene rendered with smeared, mushy textures where fine details dissolve into ambiguous softness. A clear glass vase holding dried, withered branches rests on the windowsill above a cast-iron radiator, surrounded by weathered brick in a dim, solitary atmosphere that evokes melancholy and quiet decay.
